user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter periodic reviews by a From and To period, so that I can view feedback cycles within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Periodic Review screen; When I choose a From and To date and search; Then only reviews whose periods fall in that range are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter periodic reviews by review status such as Active or Submitted, so that I can focus on reviews that still need action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Periodic Review screen; When I select a Review Status; Then the list is filtered to periodic reviews in that status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search and reset the periodic review filters, so that I can run and clear queries efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set periodic review filters; When I click Search; Then results update, and When I click Reset; Then all filters clear to defaults

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see each periodic review's period-from and period-to dates alongside employee details, so that I can track ongoing feedback cycles
acceptance_criteria: Given periodic reviews exist; When the grid loads; Then each row shows employee name, code, class, department, position, reporting manager, review period from, review period to and status

user_story: As a Manager, I want to open the task action for a periodic review, so that I can submit or complete the periodic feedback
acceptance_criteria: Given an employee has an active periodic review in the list; When I open the Task action for that row; Then I can act on the periodic feedback
